org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders

类 ApplicationBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.AbstractBuilder<ApplicationConfig,ApplicationBuilder>
      • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.ApplicationBuilder

  • public class ApplicationBuilder
extends AbstractBuilder<ApplicationConfig,ApplicationBuilder>
    This is a builder for build ApplicationConfig.
    从以下版本开始:
    2.7
